name: Nashville
tagline: Music City, No State Income Tax, and Southern Hospitality
description: Nashville combines zero state income tax with a booming cultural scene, world-class healthcare, and genuine Southern hospitality. The city's music heritage extends far beyond country — it is a hub for rock, indie, and Americana. Nashville's food scene has exploded in recent years, and the cost of living, while rising, remains well below coastal cities. Excellent hospitals like Vanderbilt make it particularly attractive for retirees who value medical access.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – safe in most neighborhoods with typical urban caution
quickFacts.climate: Subtropical with hot summers and mild to cool winters

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Madison, Antioch, or Donelson — outside the trendy core

dining.description: Hot chicken joints and casual BBQ 2-3x/week; mostly cooking at home

healthcare.description: ACA Silver plan; Tennessee has no exchange but federal marketplace works well

transportation.description: Older paid-off car with insurance and gas; Nashville requires a car

entertainment.description: Free live music on Broadway and in honky-tonks, Centennial Park, Shelby Bottoms trails

1M.lifestyle: You live in an outer neighborhood like Madison or Antioch and cook most meals at home, but Nashville's lack of state income tax helps your budget go further. Free live music on Lower Broadway and the city's excellent parks provide regular entertainment at no cost. Dining out is limited to affordable hot chicken and BBQ spots a couple of times a week.

housing.description: Nice 2BR apartment in East Nashville, Germantown, or The Nations

dining.description: Dining out 3-4x/week at Nashville's trending restaurants and brunch spots

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with dental and vision; Vanderbilt and St. Thomas network access

transportation.description: Reliable mid-range car, full coverage insurance, gas for day trips

entertainment.description: Ryman Auditorium shows, Grand Ole Opry, gym membership, Titans or Predators tickets

2M.lifestyle: You can rent a nice apartment in East Nashville or Germantown and eat out several times a week at the restaurants driving Nashville's food boom. Shows at the Ryman Auditorium, Predators or Titans games, and weekend drives to the Smoky Mountains fit comfortably in the budget. No state income tax means your full withdrawal stays in your pocket.

housing.description: 3BR house in 12 South, Sylvan Park, or a modern condo in the Gulch

dining.description: Regular dining at top spots like Catbird Seat, The Catbird Seat, Bastion; daily coffee ritual

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with Vanderbilt network access and comprehensive coverage

transportation.description: Late-model SUV, premium insurance, weekend drives to the mountains

entertainment.description: Season tickets to Predators or Titans, VIP concert access, premium gym, golf

3M.lifestyle: You can rent a house in a desirable area like 12 South or Sylvan Park and dine regularly at top Nashville restaurants. Season tickets to the Predators or Titans are within reach, along with regular travel and good private healthcare through the Vanderbilt network. Weekend trips to the Tennessee countryside or Great Smoky Mountains are a natural addition.

housing.description: Luxury home in Belle Meade, Green Hills, or a penthouse in the Gulch

dining.description: Fine dining multiple times per week, private chef for dinner parties

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine at Vanderbilt; executive wellness and preventive programs

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle (Mercedes, Tesla), premium insurance, detailing service

entertainment.description: VIP boxes at Bridgestone Arena, exclusive songwriter rounds, country club membership

domesticHelp.description: Bi-weekly deep cleaning, landscaping, pool maintenance, errand service

luxuryExtras.description: Quarterly travel, private music events, bourbon collection, philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: A large home in Belle Meade or Green Hills, regular dining at Nashville's best restaurants, and a housekeeper several times a week. You can afford concierge medicine at Vanderbilt, a nice car, and business class flights for longer trips. Tennessee's zero income tax keeps your full withdrawal intact, and the budget supports country club membership and regular entertainment.

housing.description: Estate in Belle Meade, historic mansion in Oak Hill, or private compound outside the city

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive dining experiences, catered events with Nashville's top talent

healthcare.description: Top-tier concierge at Vanderbilt, executive health screenings, holistic wellness

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private driver, classic car collection

entertainment.description: Private suite at Bridgestone Arena, music industry philanthropy, art collecting, international travel

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, personal assistant, estate groundskeeper, pool and property manager

luxuryExtras.description: First-class international travel, recording studio investment, ranch property, angel investing

10M.lifestyle: Premium housing in Belle Meade or Oak Hill, regular fine dining, a cook who comes several times a week, and a housekeeper. Business class or first class travel, full concierge healthcare at Vanderbilt, and a private suite at Bridgestone Arena for concerts and Predators games. Nashville's zero income tax and moderate cost of living mean you never think about day-to-day spending.
